The following Awakeners will automatically obtain the "Absolute Axiom" effect when Psyche Surge reaches +12. Please note that we have received community feedback, and in V2.5.1 we will Enhance the base capabilities of some Awakeners to help them better Adapt to the latest game environment without needing "Absolute Axiom." We will also make further reasonable adjustments to underperforming "Absolute Axiom" effects, while a small number of overpowered "Absolute Axiom" effects may have some of their Effects converted into base stat Enhancements in V2.5.1. Although overall Final Battle combat power will not be reduced in any way, this may affect your resource investment strategy. Please make sure you are fully aware of this before pursuing Absolute Axiom! We will communicate any potentially affected content with everyone as soon as possible through developer logs.
